2.solution: Total revenue for 8.33% (=1/12) profit on 480 oranges: 480cГ—13/12=520c. New SP per orange after 30% markup from CP: 1.3c. Unspoiled oranges n: nГ—1.3c=520c вҶ’ n=400. Answer: B.

4.solution: GГ—p=875, BГ—(p-10)=375, G+B=60. Substituting: 10GВІ-1850G+52500=0 вҶ’ GВІ-185G+5250=0 вҶ’ G=35, B=25. p=25, blue=15. Sum=40. Answer: B.

6.solution: Profit day 1=2c/25 (8% of CP). Doubles: days 2-5 = 4,8,16,32 Г— c/25. Total profit=62c/25. Total CP=5c. Overall%=(62c/25)/(5c)Г—100=49.6%. Answer: C.

8.solution: Stats=1.4E, total=2.4E. Participants=0.6N; non=N; total=1.6N=2.4E вҶ’ N=1.5E; participants=0.9E. Stats/participants=1.4E/0.9EГ—100=155.55%. Answer: B.

9.solution: Investments 10k:7k:8k=25k. After year 1: 12k+9k+10k=31k (28.56%вүҲ2/7 growth for bank 2: 7kГ—9/7=9k). Growth X=(31-25)/25=24%. Two years: 1.24ВІ-1=0.5376=53.76%. Answer: D.

10.solution: After 3 wins: (x+14000)/8. Set equal to x/2: x+14000=4x вҶ’ x=14000/3. 6x=28000. Answer: A.
